== Notes for [[Item:Q81881|Q81881]] ==

From ''Banu Zahrah'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wahb_ibn_%27Abd_Manaf

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aminah_bint_Wahb
--------------------
Wahb ibn 'Abd Manaf (Arabic: وهب بن عبد مناف‎) ibn Zuhrah ibn Kilab ibn Murrah was the chief of Banu Zuhrah, and the father of Aminah bint Wahb. He was thus the grandfather of Islamic prophet Muhammad

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
